title: Web Data, Fetch, Storage, and Security Boundaries · Semantics Case: Storage Lifecycle
summary: Load and cache public service data while handling hostile input, offline states, privacy, and response failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js storage lifecycle increment in a resilient privacy-aware service-data client. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose memory, sessionStorage, localStorage, Cache, or IndexedDB from size, lifetime, concurrency, privacy, and transaction needs.
Parse, validate, transform, and serialize JSON while accounting for unsupported values and hostile object shape.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
